title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruption, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Conduct a thorough review and hardening of CI/CD pipelines, including implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA) and restricting access to critical systems.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored offline or in secure, isolated environments to prevent ransomware encryption.
Deploy advanced threat detection tools to monitor for suspicious activity in cloud environments and respond promptly to potential breaches.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A vulnerability was detected in SourceCodester Pizzafy E-Commerce System 1.0. Affected by this...
description: A vulnerability was detected in SourceCodester Pizzafy E-Commerce System 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is the function Login of the file /admin/admin_class_novo.php of the component Administrative Control Panel. The manipulation of the argument Username results in sql injection. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10704.

title: A flaw has been found in dask up to 3.0. Affected by this issue is the function nunique_approx of...
description: A flaw has been found in dask up to 3.0. Affected by this issue is the function nunique_approx of the file dask/dataframe/hyperloglog.py of the component HLL Handler. This manipulation causes resource consumption. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. A high degree of complexity is needed for the attack. The exploitation is known to be difficult. The pull request to fix this issue awaits acceptance.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the 'nunique_approx' function of Dask's HLL Handler can lead to increased resource consumption if exploited. However, due to the high complexity and difficulty of exploitation, the likelihood of successful attacks is low. The impact is limited to potential performance degradation.
recommended_actions: Monitor the GitHub repository for updates and apply the patch once the pull request is accepted.
Restrict access to systems running Dask to trusted networks to minimize remote exploitation risk.
Review resource usage patterns for anomalies that may indicate exploitation attempts.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in EIPStackGroup OpENer up to 2.3.0. Affected is the...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in EIPStackGroup OpENer up to 2.3.0. Affected is the function CreateMessageRouterRequestStructure of the file cipmessagerouter.c of the component SendRRData Handler. The manipulation leads to use after free. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10703.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in SourceCodester Online Boat Reservation System 1.0....
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in SourceCodester Online Boat Reservation System 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the component Administrative Endpoint. The manipulation leads to improper authorization. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. Multiple endpoints are affected.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in SourceCodester Online Boat Reservation System 1.0 allows for improper authorization through the administrative endpoint. If exploited, attackers could gain unauthorized access to sensitive administrative functionalities, potentially compromising data integrity and system operations.
affected_industries: Small Businesses using the affected system
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available security patches or updates provided by the vendor.
Restrict access to the administrative endpoint by implementing IP whitelisting or VPN-based access controls.
Conduct a thorough security review of the system to identify and mitigate other potential vulnerabilities.

title: Cpanel::JSON::XS versions before 4.41 for Perl allow denial of service via UTF-8 BOM prefixed...
description:
Cpanel::JSON::XS versions before 4.41 for Perl allow denial of service via UTF-8 BOM prefixed input when a decode filter callback throws.

To skip a leading 3-byte UTF-8 BOM, decode_json() advances the input scalar's string pointer past the mark with SvPV_set() and restores it only on the normal return path. When decoding aborts through a Perl exception, for example a filter_json_object callback that croaks, the restore is skipped and the scalar is left with its string pointer offset into its ow

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9516.

description: A vulnerability was detected in SourceCodester Online Food Ordering System 2.0. Affected by this issue is the function include of the file /index.php. The manipulation of the argument page results in file inclusion. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10694.

title: Cpanel::JSON::XS versions before 4.41 for Perl allow type confusion via duplicate object keys...
description:
Cpanel::JSON::XS versions before 4.41 for Perl allow type confusion via duplicate object keys when dupkeys_as_arrayref is enabled.

decode_hv() collapses duplicate object keys into an array reference under dupkeys_as_arrayref. The branch reached for a duplicate key tests `SvTYPE (old_value) != SVt_RV && SvTYPE (SvRV (old_value)) != SVt_PVAV`, which evaluates SvRV(old_value) before establishing that old_value is a reference. When the existing value is a plain scalar rather than an array reference

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Cpanel::JSON::XS versions before 4.41 for Perl allows type confusion, which could lead to unexpected behavior, application crashes, or potential exploitation if an attacker can control input data. This could compromise the integrity of applications relying on the library for JSON parsing.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to Cpanel::JSON::XS version 4.41 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Audit codebases and dependencies to identify and update any instances of vulnerable versions of Cpanel::JSON::XS.
Implement input validation and sanitization to reduce the risk of exploitation from untrusted data.

description: A security flaw has been discovered in wonderwhy-er DesktopCommanderMCP up to 0.2.38. This impacts an unknown function of the file src/search-manager.ts of the component start_search. Performing a manipulation of the argument SearchResult[] results in inefficient regular expression complexity. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks. Upgrading to version 0.2.39 will fix this issue. The patch is named 4ce845f8749b6a15

title: The Passeum Ticketing plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all...
description: The Passeum Ticketing plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to, and including, 1.0. This is due to the `get_shop_url()` method returning the `shop_name` setting value without sanitization when it begins with "http", combined with insufficient validation in the `validate_shop_name()` function which only checks for empty values and string type. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Administrator-level access and above, to inject arb

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with Administrator-level access to inject malicious scripts into the application via the Passeum Ticketing plugin. This could lead to persistent cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, enabling attackers to steal sensitive information, manipulate content, or compromise user sessions.
recommended_actions: Update the Passeum Ticketing plugin to a patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement input sanitization and output encoding for the `shop_name` setting to prevent malicious script injection.
Restrict Administrator-level access to only trusted users and regularly review user permissions.

title: The EmergencyWP – Dead Man's switch & legacy deliverance plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to...
description: The EmergencyWP – Dead Man's switch & legacy deliverance plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.4.2. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the form_settings_ui (settings save handler, procedural include scope) function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to modify plugin settings including the minimum access role (altering WordPress role capabilities via add_cap/remove_cap), the data-erasure-on-

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9732.

title: A vulnerability was identified in wonderwhy-er DesktopCommanderMCP 0.2.37. This affects the...
description: A vulnerability was identified in wonderwhy-er DesktopCommanderMCP 0.2.37. This affects the function readFileFromUrl of the file src/tools/filesystem.ts of the component read_file. Such manipulation of the argument url leads to server-side request forgery. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. The name of the patch is 53699bebba9950047bca16ac4dc8f0568f596aaa. It is best practice to apply a patch to resolve this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for server-side request forgery (SSRF), which could enable attackers to manipulate server requests, potentially exposing sensitive internal resources or systems. However, the severity is rated low, likely due to limited exploitability or impact scope.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the patch identified as 53699bebba9950047bca16ac4dc8f0568f596aaa to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and monitor server logs for any unusual or unauthorized requests to detect potential exploitation attempts.
Conduct a security audit of the application to identify and address any other SSRF-related vulnerabilities.

title: When returning errors, functions in the net/textproto package would include its input as part of...
description: When returning errors, functions in the net/textproto package would include its input as part of the error. This might allow an attacker to inject misleading content to errors that are printed or logged.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-42507.

title: Decoding a maliciously-crafted MIME header containing many invalid encoded-words can consume...
description: Decoding a maliciously-crafted MIME header containing many invalid encoded-words can consume excessive CPU.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit a flaw in MIME header decoding, leading to excessive CPU consumption. This could result in denial-of-service (DoS) conditions, impacting system performance and availability.
affected_industries: Enterprises using email or messaging services
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by the affected software vendor to address CVE-2026-42504.
Implement rate-limiting and resource throttling mechanisms to mitigate excessive CPU usage caused by malformed MIME headers.
Monitor and analyze logs for unusual patterns or spikes in resource usage related to MIME header processing.

title: Out of bounds write in openSeaChest’s Trim/Unmap operation in Seagate’s openSeaChest v26.03.0 on...
description: Out of bounds write in openSeaChest’s Trim/Unmap operation in Seagate’s openSeaChest v26.03.0 on all supported platforms allows for writing extra memory describing a range of LBAs to deallocate 16 bytes outside of the allocated space when running this operation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an attacker to exploit an out-of-bounds write in the Trim/Unmap operation of Seagate’s openSeaChest tool, potentially leading to data corruption, unexpected behavior, or system crashes. This could impact systems relying on openSeaChest for disk management.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest patched version of openSeaChest as soon as a fix is released by Seagate.
Implement input validation and boundary checks to mitigate potential exploitation of the vulnerability.
Monitor systems using openSeaChest for unusual behavior or crashes and restrict access to trusted users only.

title: Out of bounds write and reads in openSeaChest’s --showSCSIDefects in Seagate’s openSeaChest v25...
description: Out of bounds write and reads in openSeaChest’s --showSCSIDefects in Seagate’s openSeaChest v25.05.3 on all supported platforms allows for writing defect information out of bounds for very large defects lists via a very bad drive with lots of defects or a maliciously crafted SCSI device’s defect response length.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10717.

title: Fixed a VM panic caused by unbounded recursion in the grpcfuse kernel module when a container...
description: Fixed a VM panic caused by unbounded recursion in the grpcfuse kernel module when a container created deeply nested directories on a bind-mounted host folder and triggered a dentry invalidation event. This issue has been fixed in Docker Desktop 4.76.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8936.

title: QloApps through 1.7.0, fixed in commit 64e9722, contains a weak cryptographic algorithm...
description: QloApps through 1.7.0, fixed in commit 64e9722, contains a weak cryptographic algorithm vulnerability that allows attackers to compromise user credentials by exploiting the use of MD5 for password hashing in the Tools::encrypt() function within classes/Tools.php, which concatenates a static cookie key with the supplied password. Attackers can perform offline brute-force attacks against the MD5 hashes, with the risk compounded by auto-generated 8-character passwords assigned during guest-to-custo

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-25861.

title: (*x509.Certificate).VerifyHostname previously called matchHostnames in a loop over all DNS...
description: (*x509.Certificate).VerifyHostname previously called matchHostnames in a loop over all DNS Subject Alternative Name (SAN) entries. This caused strings.Split(host, ".") to execute repeatedly on the same input hostname. With a large DNS SAN list, verification costs scaled quadratically based on the number of SAN entries multiplied by the hostname's label count. Because x509.Verify validates hostnames before building the certificate chain, this overhead occurred even for untrusted certificates.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-27145.

title: Out of bounds write in openSeaChest’s --showSupportedFormats in Seagate’s openSeaChest v25.05.3...
description: Out of bounds write in openSeaChest’s --showSupportedFormats in Seagate’s openSeaChest v25.05.3 on all supported platforms allows for writing 1 extra byte outside of allocated memory which sets a value to 1 via a maliciously crafted NVMe device with a bogus value in the namespace FLBAS byte.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for an out-of-bounds write, which could potentially lead to memory corruption or unexpected behavior in the openSeaChest tool when interacting with malicious NVMe devices. However, the severity is low due to the specific conditions required to exploit this issue.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of openSeaChest once a patch is released to address CVE-2026-10719.
Restrict usage of untrusted or unknown NVMe devices to prevent exploitation of the vulnerability.
Monitor Seagate's GitHub repository and official channels for updates and advisories related to this issue.

title: CVE-2026-9628 - A weakness has been identified in UTT HiPER 1200GW up to 2.5.3-170306. Affected is an unknown functi
description: A weakness has been identified in UTT HiPER 1200GW up to 2.5.3-170306. Affected is an unknown function of the file /goform/formPptpClientConfig of the component Web Management Interface. This manipulation of the argument PPTP server address/username/password/tunnel name causes stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9628.

title: CVE-2026-9627 - A security flaw has been discovered in UTT HiPER 1200GW up to 2.5.3-170306. This impacts the functio
description: A security flaw has been discovered in UTT HiPER 1200GW up to 2.5.3-170306. This impacts the function strcpy of the file /goform/setSysAdm of the component Web Management Interface. The manipulation of the argument sysAdmUser/sysAdmPass results in buffer overflow. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the UTT HiPER 1200GW's Web Management Interface allows for a buffer overflow attack via the sysAdmUser/sysAdmPass arguments. This could enable remote attackers to execute arbitrary code, potentially leading to full system compromise, data theft, or service disruption.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched firmware version, if available, or contact the vendor for guidance.
Restrict access to the Web Management Interface by implementing IP whitelisting or VPN access.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and apply intrusion detection/prevention systems to detect exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-7493 - The Appointment Booking Calendar — Simply Schedule Appointments Booking Plugin plugin for WordPress
description: The Appointment Booking Calendar — Simply Schedule Appointments Booking Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to denial of service in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.11.5. This is due to a publicly accessible REST API endpoint (/wp-json/ssa/v1/async) that calls PHP's sleep() function on a user-supplied delay parameter without any rate limiting. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to exhaust PHP worker processes, denying access to the site to legitimate users.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7493.

title: CVE-2026-6565 - The Style Kits – Advanced Theme Styles for Elementor, Elementor Kits & Elementor Patterns plugin for
description: The Style Kits – Advanced Theme Styles for Elementor, Elementor Kits & Elementor Patterns plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the '/wp-json/agwp/v1/tokens/save' endpoint kit title parameter in versions up to, and including, 2.5.0 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping in an admin attribute context. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6565.

title: CVE-2026-49017 - In OpenStack Swift before 2.36.2 and 2.37.2, s3api middleware enters an infinite loop when processin
description: In OpenStack Swift before 2.36.2 and 2.37.2, s3api middleware enters an infinite loop when processing a truncated aws-chunked PUT request body. The StreamingInput class repeatedly appends an empty buffer and re-reads, causing the proxy-server worker handling the request to become permanently unresponsive with increasing CPU and memory consumption. An authenticated attacker can systematically exhaust all proxy-server workers, resulting in denial of service. The defect was introduced in Swift 2.36.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49017.

title: CVE-2026-49014 - In GDAL 3.1.0 through 3.13.0, scanForGeometryContainers in the netCDF driver allows code execution v
description: In GDAL 3.1.0 through 3.13.0, scanForGeometryContainers in the netCDF driver allows code execution via a stack-based buffer overflow. It reads a geometry attribute into a fixed-size stack buffer without validating the attribute length. The attacker embeds the exploit as an oversized geometry attribute in a crafted NetCDF file. This achieves arbitrary code execution on the server running GDAL. This is in frmts/netcdf/netcdfsg.cpp.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49014.

title: CVE-2026-9605 - A flaw has been found in GNU libredwg up to 0.13.4.8160. This issue affects the function bit_read_RC
description: A flaw has been found in GNU libredwg up to 0.13.4.8160. This issue affects the function bit_read_RC of the file bits.c of the component Dwgbmp Utility. This manipulation causes heap-based buffer overflow. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. Patch name: 8f03865f37f5d4ffd616fef802acc980be54d300. Applying a patch is the recommended action to fix this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9605.

title: CVE-2026-9312 - A server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability was identified in GitHub Enterprise Server that a
description: A server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability was identified in GitHub Enterprise Server that allowed an unauthenticated attacker to send crafted requests to internal services by exploiting insufficient input validation in an upload endpoint. By injecting path traversal content into request parameters, an attacker could bypass the intended request flow and redirect internal API calls, potentially accessing internal services and exposing sensitive credentials. This vulnerability affected all versions of GitHub Enterprise Server prior to 3.22 and was fixed in versions 3.16.20, 3.17.17, 3.18.11, 3.19.8, 3.20.4, and 3.21.1. This vulnerability was reported via the GitHub Bug Bounty program.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9312.

title: CVE-2026-8606 - A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability was identified in GitHub Enterprise Server that a
description: A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability was identified in GitHub Enterprise Server that allowed an attacker to cause the server to issue HTTP requests to internal services via the security advisories package lookup feature. By directing requests to an internal management service and measuring response timing, an attacker could infer the values of sensitive environment variables, including signing secrets and private keys. Exploitation required GitHub Packages to be enabled; on instances not running in private mode the vulnerability was exploitable without authentication, otherwise any authenticated user could exploit it. This vulnerability affected all versions of GitHub Enterprise Server prior to 3.21.1 and was fixed in versions 3.20.3, 3.19.7, 3.18.10, 3.17.16, and 3.16.19. This vulnerability was reported via the GitHub Bug Bounty program.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8606.
